revision.comment: Undid revision 1175594613 by [[Special:Contributions/Rjjiii|Rjjiii]] ([[User talk:Rjjiii|talk]]) This is too wide for a box template sometimes used to hold refs.
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:list|unbulleted|list_style=display:inline-block|style=display:inline-flex;--size:100%; max-width:max(15em, calc(var(--size) - 3.2em));}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:list|unbulleted|list_style=display:inline-block|style=display:inline-flex;--size:100%; max-width:max(15em, calc(var(--size) - 3.2em));}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:list|unbulleted|list_style=display:inline-block|style=display:inline-flex;--size:100%; max-width:max(15em, calc(var(--size) - 3.2em));}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
